The '''Eclipse Team''' was an infamous [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|SpecForce]] team in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Five graduates from the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]] who had joined the Alliance decided to create the team: Major [[Sisquoc]]; Lieutenant Commander [[Adazian Liebke]], Lieutenants [[Akul Witig]] and [[Ma'w'shiye]], and commander [[Derembus Sitnalta]].<ref name="AIR" />

Later, the Eclipse Team became big enough to divide in different sub-units, such as the infamous [[Twilight Squadron (Rebel)|Twilight Squadron]] (a reference to [[Twilight Class]], their old class at the GOSS),<ref name="AIR" /> [[Lightning Tech Squadron]],<ref name="J10" /> [[Midnight Squadron]], infiltration [[Shadow Squadron (Rebel)|Shadow Squadron]], [[Storm Squadron (Rebel)|Storm Squadron]] and Cloak Leader.<ref name="AIR" />

They also added other members such as Lieutenant Commander [[Anson Blazer]] (in Shadow Squadron), Agent [[Tynan Ryln Mei]] (in Storm Squadron), lieutenant [[Alton Lochner]] (in Cloak Leader) and [[Tirranna]].<ref name="AIR" />

In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], the Eclipse Team worked for the [[Task Force on Alliance Security]] compiling information about threats to the Rebel Alliance (including the Galactic Outdoor School of Survival). In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the Eclipse Team worked on [[Suolriep sector/Legends|Suolriep sector]].<ref name="AIR" />

The Eclipse Team remained in active service following the formation of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="J10" />
